title: MemSw Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Function MemSw (BitNumber As Integer) As Boolean

Function MemSw (Label As String) As Boolean
parameters:
BitNumber	Integer expression representing one of the memory I/O bits.

Label	String expression containing a memory I/O bit label.
description: Returns the specified memory I/O bit status.
see_also:
In

InBCD

Sw

Off

On

Oport

MemSw Example

VB Example:

If m_spel.MemSw(10) Then

  m_spel.On(2)

End If

C# Example:

if (m_spel.MemSw(10))

   m_spel.On(2);
examples:
If m_spel.MemSw(10) Then m_spel.On(2)
End If
